rationale: The cited paper directly studies voluntary advertising-spending disclosure in Compustat (post-FRR44), which is plausibly relevant to the citing paper’s key strategic-emphasis measure based on advertising and R&D expenditures from similar archival data. However, the citing note centers on acquisition-versus-alliance governance theory (TCE/RBV) and provides no explicit evidence that this citation is a core theory/method anchor rather than background, and the matched evidence is only a bare DOI record.
